name: io.github.codespar/mcp-caf
description: MCP server for Caf — Brazilian identity + Trust Platform (KYC/KYB, face authentication + liveness, document validation + OCR, orchestrated onboarding).

environmentVariables.name: CAF_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key from the Caf dashboard

environmentVariables.name: CAF_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: API base URL — defaults to Caf production. Override for sandbox.
